# electerm

> Terminal/ssh/telnet/serialport/sftp client in Linux, Mac, Win

electerm is an open-source terminal emulator, SSH client, SFTP client, and serial port manager. It provides a modern interface for managing remote connections with support for multiple protocols.

## Key Features

- SSH, Telnet, and Serial Port connections
- Built-in SFTP file transfer
- Multi-tab terminal interface
- Cross-platform: Windows, macOS, Linux
- Theme customization and UI personalization
- Sync settings across devices
- AI-powered command assistance

## Main Pages

- [Home Page](https://electerm.html5beta.com/) - Main landing page with download links
- [Video Guides](https://electerm.html5beta.com/videos) - Tutorial videos and demos
- [Debian Repository](https://electerm.html5beta.com/deb) - APT repository setup for Debian/Ubuntu
- [Sponsor](https://electerm.html5beta.com/sponsor-electerm.html) - Support electerm development

## Download Links

- [Windows Downloads](https://electerm.html5beta.com/#windows) - Installer and portable versions
- [macOS Downloads](https://electerm.html5beta.com/#mac) - DMG for Intel and Apple Silicon
- [Linux Downloads](https://electerm.html5beta.com/#linux) - DEB, RPM, AppImage, Snap packages

## Documentation

- [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/electerm/electerm) - Source code and issue tracker
- [Wiki](https://github.com/electerm/electerm/wiki) - Documentation and guides
- [Known Issues](https://github.com/electerm/electerm/wiki/Know-issues) - Current limitations
- [Troubleshooting](https://github.com/electerm/electerm/wiki/Troubleshoot) - Common solutions
- [Discussions](https://github.com/electerm/electerm/discussions) - Community forum

## Related Projects

- [electerm-web](https://github.com/electerm/electerm-web) - Web-based version
- [electerm-web-docker](https://github.com/electerm/electerm-web-docker) - Docker deployment
- [electerm-locales](https://github.com/electerm/electerm-locales) - Language packs

- [Windows Store](https://www.microsoft.com/store/apps/9NCN7272GTFF) - Microsoft Store listing
- [Snap Store](https://snapcraft.io/electerm) - Snap package
